text.title: design-tokens-fundamentals Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for design-tokens-fundamentals as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Primitive tokens leaking into component code (e.g., color.blue.500 used in a button component directly).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Makes theming and dark mode impossible. Any change to blue.500 breaks every component referencing it unpredictably.

failure-mode.description: LLM-generated tokens skipping the semantic layer entirely — outputting only primitive and component tiers.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without semantic layer, theming requires editing every component token. Force 3-tier output schema in the prompt.

failure-mode.description: Auto-deriving dark theme algorithmically from light theme.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Algorithmic inversion produces poor contrast and violates accessibility requirements. Dark-mode semantic layer must be hand-tuned and contrast-validated.

failure-mode.description: Cross-platform output emitting px values for iOS (expects pt) or Android (expects dp/sp).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs paste px everywhere without transforms. Style Dictionary must declare unit transforms per platform or assets render at wrong sizes on mobile.
